claimText: The UAE Consensus was adopted at COP28 in 2023 and marked the first-ever Global Stocktake under the Paris Agreement.
evidenceExcerpt: The UAE Consensus was adopted at COP28 in 2023, marking the first-ever Global Stocktake under the Paris Agreement.
examUse: Statement-based question on COP28 outcomes and the timeline of the Global Stocktake.

claimText: The UAE Consensus sets global goals to triple renewable energy and double energy efficiency by 2030.
evidenceExcerpt: It sets global goals to triple renewable energy and double energy efficiency by 2030.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific quantitative targets of the UAE Consensus.
distractorHooks: Double renewable energy and triple energy efficiency

claimText: The UAE Consensus urges nations to transition away from fossil fuels to achieve net zero emissions by 2050 and keep global warming within 1.5 degrees Celsius.
evidenceExcerpt: It urges nations to transition away from fossil fuels to achieve net zero emissions by 2050. The consensus reinforces the collective aim to keep global warming within 1.5 degrees Celsius.
examUse: Statement-based question on the long-term temperature and emission goals of the UAE Consensus.
distractorHooks: Immediate phase-out of all fossil fuels by 2030
